text.title: Mobile Perf Budget Output Contract
text.summary: Pins the shape of the perf-budget.yaml + CI gate config + RUM report.

field.name: measurement
field.constraint: lab_devices includes low-end device per r5; rum_provider is non-null

forbidden.pattern: budget_axes missing any of the 3 mandatory (violates r1)
measurement.lab_devices empty OR contains only simulators / flagship-only (violates r2, r5)
regression_history entries with axis breach AND resolution == "TBD" past 7 days (violates r4)
binary_size_mb_max absent OR set to 0 / null (no enforcement)

allowed-transformations.transformation: Adjust budgets after major platform change (e.g., framework upgrade) — record bump in regression_history with reason.
Add additional axes (memory_high_water_mark, network_payload_kb) — they extend, never replace, the mandatory 3.
Whitelist specific screens with higher frame_drop tolerance (animation-heavy) — must be explicit and reviewed.

list.item: All 3 axes present with numeric budgets
Lab devices include a low-end model
Last audited ≤ 30 days for active products
